items.title: Google Health is here, but a lot of people want their Fitbit app back instead
items.summary: The Fitbit app is no more. items.summary: I've rounded up the best smartphone deals you can shop this Memorial Day. Discounts are still live, so now is a great time to save.

items.title: GE’s nugget ice maker is nearly half off if you buy it refurbished
items.summary: If you’re looking for ways to make staying cool and hydrated easier this summer, Woot is currently selling a refurbished GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker for $264.99 through June 3rd. items.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
items.summary: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.

items.title: One of the most user-friendly Linux distros I've ever used is also one of the most secure
items.summary: Immutable Linux is the best path toward a truly secure operating system, and Aurora Linux might be the finest option for new users.

items.summary: This custom Wi-Fi router works off-grid with Starlink and can control my solar power station. Here's how I went about it.

items.title: I've used Chrome, Edge, and Safari for years - here's why Firefox is the better browser for most people
items.summary: Firefox is alive and well - and offering a fast, customizable, bloat-free, private, secure browsing experience from developers who actually listen to their users.

items.title: The Netherlands just blocked a US company from buying the cloud provider that runs Dutch digital identity
items.summary: The Dutch government has imposed a “complete prohibition” on the acquisition of Solvinity, a Dutch cloud provider, by Kyndryl, the American IT infrastructure company spun out of IBM in 2021. items.title: Dropbox founder Drew Houston steps down as CEO after 19 years as the company he built gets squeezed by Google and Apple
items.summary: Drew Houston, the co-founder who built Dropbox from a Y Combinator demo into a company with more than 700 million registered users, is stepping down as chief executive. items.title: American Airlines is getting Starlink Wi-Fi
items.summary: American Airlines is planning to install SpaceX's Starlink Wi-Fi in hundreds of its airplanes, the airline announced today. items.title: I quit ChatGPT for a free, private, and local AI called Ollama - here's why
items.summary: Save your money, your privacy, and the planet. This installable AI offers several benefits you won't find with more traditional models like ChatGPT.
